generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and taxpayer, I've always believed in supporting our military to keep us safe. But have you seen how much we're spending on foreign defense contracts while our own communities struggle? It's time we focus on real security at home. Let's make sure our tax dollars actually protect our families, not just corporate profits. #StrongerAtHome #NationalSecurity
